vocabulary.english: To lower; to reduce; to decrease
vocabulary.example: 气温降低了很多，出现了今年最冷的天气。
vocabulary.translation: The temperature has dropped significantly, and the coldest weather of the year has appeared.

vocabulary.english: To land; to descend; to fall
vocabulary.example: 飞机顺利降落，大家都松了一口气。
vocabulary.translation: The airplane landed smoothly, everyone breathed a sigh of relief.

vocabulary.english: To appear; to emerge; to occur
vocabulary.example: 只要你不放弃，好结果就会出现的。
vocabulary.translation: As long as you don't give up, good results will appear.

vocabulary.example: 只要坚持，就能增加信心.
vocabulary.translation: As long as you persist, you can increase confidence.

vocabulary.example: 日常生活中我们要减少使用塑料袋。
vocabulary.translation: We should reduce using plastic bags in our daily life.

vocabulary.example: 天气发生了变化，温度降低了，变得凉快了很多。
vocabulary.translation: The weather has changed, temperature lowered ， it is becoming much cooler.

vocabulary.example: 开车时不能喝酒，不然会很危险。
vocabulary.translation: You must not drink and drive, it's very dangerous

vocabulary.example: 天气从暖和突然变得这么凉快，真快。
vocabulary.translation: The weather changed from warm to this cool so suddenly — it really is fast.

vocabulary.example: 气温降低，天气变得凉快了很多。
vocabulary.translation: The temperature dropped, and the weather became much cooler.

vocabulary.example: 他仍然很担心这次考试
vocabulary.translation: He is still worried about this exam.

vocabulary.example: 只要你加件外套，就不必担心着凉了。
vocabulary.translation: As long as you add a jacket, there's no need to worry about catching a cold.

key_sentences.chinese: 只要你坚持努力，就一定能看到好结果。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhǐ yào nǐ jiān chí nǔ lì, jiù yí dìng néng kàn dào hǎo jié guǒ.
key_sentences.english: As long as you keep working hard, you will definitely see good results.

key_sentences.chinese: 气温降低了很多，出现了今年最冷的天气。
key_sentences.pinyin: Qì wēn jiàng dī le hěn duō, chū xiàn le jīn nián zuì lěng de tiān qì.
key_sentences.english: The temperature has dropped significantly, and the coldest weather of the year has appeared.

key_sentences.chinese: 他仍然担心，但多了一些信心, 想继续发展自己的能力。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā réng rán dān xīn, dàn duō le xìn xīn jì xù fā zhǎn zì jǐ de néng lì.
key_sentences.english: He is still worried, but he has gained a bit of his confidence and continues to develop his abilities.

key_sentences.chinese: 只要减少担心，增加行动，结果就会发生变化。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhǐ yào jiǎn shǎo dān xīn, zēng jiā xíng dòng, jié guǒ jiù huì fā shēng biàn huà.
key_sentences.english: As long as you reduce worry and increase action, the result will undergo change.

key_sentences.chinese: 飞机顺利降落，大家都松了一口气。
key_sentences.pinyin: Fēi jī shùn lì jiàng luò, dà jiā dōu sōng le yì kǒu qì.
key_sentences.english: The airplane landed smoothly, everyone breathed a sigh of relief.

key_sentences.chinese: 天气发生了变化，温度降低了，变得凉快了很多。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tiān qì fā shēng le biàn huà, wēn dù jiàng dī le , biàn de liáng kuai le hěn duō.
key_sentences.english: The weather has changed, temperature lowered and is becoming much cooler.

key_sentences.chinese: 气温突然降低，危险也随之增加了。
key_sentences.pinyin: Qì wēn tū rán jiàng dī, wēi xiǎn yě suí zhī zēng jiā le.
key_sentences.english: The temperature suddenly dropped, and danger increased along with it.

key_sentences.chinese: 发展过快会导致各种危险情况发生。
key_sentences.pinyin: Fā zhǎn guò kuài huì dǎo zhì gè zhǒng wēi xiǎn qíng kuàng fā shēng.
key_sentences.english: Developing too fast can lead to various dangerous situations occurring.

key_sentences.chinese: 我们必须减少危险，防止更多问题出现。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men bì xū jiǎn shǎo wēi xiǎn, fáng zhǐ gèng duō wèn tí chū xiàn.
key_sentences.english: We must reduce dangers and prevent more problems from appearing.

grammar_points.title: 只要...就... — As long as...then...
grammar_points.explanation: 只要...就... means 'as long as' or 'provided that'. It introduces a sufficient condition: if the condition in 只要 is met, the result in 就 will follow. Structure: 只要 + Condition, (Subject) + 就 + Result. Unlike 如果 (if), 只要 emphasizes that the condition alone is sufficient — nothing else is needed. Example: 只要努力，就能成功。(As long as you work hard, you can succeed.)

examples.chinese: 只要坚持锻炼，就会增加体力。
examples.pinyin: Zhǐ yào jiān chí duàn liàn, jiù huì zēng jiā tǐ lì.
examples.english: As long as you persist in exercising, you will increase your physical strength.

examples.chinese: 只要二月到了，你就会发现天气慢慢变得暖和了。
examples.pinyin: Zhǐ yào èr yuè dào le, nǐ jiù huì fā xiàn tiān qì màn man biàn de nuǎn huo le.
examples.english: As long as February comes, you will find that weather gradually becomes warmer.

exercises.question: _____ 你足够努力，就一定会考好。
只要减少担心，_____ 能增加信心。
Choose the correct sentence with 只要...就...
exercises.correct: 只要发生变化，就要认真应对。
options: 只要发生变化，就要认真应对。
发生只要变化，就要认真应对。
只要就发生变化，要认真应对。
只要发生变化就，认真应对要。
option_pinyin: Zhǐ yào fā shēng biàn huà, jiù yào rèn zhēn yìng duì.
Fā shēng zhǐ yào biàn huà, jiù yào rèn zhēn yìng duì.
Zhǐ yào jiù fā shēng biàn huà, yào rèn zhēn yìng duì.
Zhǐ yào fā shēng biàn huà jiù, rèn zhēn yìng duì yào.

exercises.question: What is the key difference between 只要 and 如果?
exercises.correct: 只要 means the condition alone is sufficient; 如果 simply introduces a condition
options: 只要 means the condition alone is sufficient; 如果 simply introduces a condition
They mean exactly the same thing
只要 is used only in formal writing

grammar_points.title: 增加 vs 减少 — Increase vs decrease (comparative expressions)
grammar_points.explanation: 增加 (zēng jiā) means 'to increase' or 'to add'. 减少 (jiǎn shǎo) means 'to reduce' or 'to decrease'. Both can be used as verbs with objects or in comparative sentences. Structure: Subject + 增加/减少 + Object OR Subject + 增加/减少 + Amount/Degree. They are often used together to make comparisons: 增加了...，减少了... Example: 收入增加了，压力也减少了。(Income increased and stress decreased.)

examples.chinese: 随着气候变化，降雨量增加了，但阳光减少了。
examples.pinyin: Suí zhe qì hòu biàn huà, jiàng yǔ liàng zēng jiā le, dàn yáng guāng jiǎn shǎo le.
examples.english: As the climate changes, rainfall has increased but sunshine has decreased.

examples.chinese: 只要坚持下去，就能增加信心。
examples.pinyin: Zhǐ yào jiān chí xià qù, jiù néng zēng jiā xìn xīn.
examples.english: As long as you persist, you can increase confidence.

exercises.question: 随着努力，他的信心 _____ 了。
她 _____ 了生活开支，但仍然努力工作，发展事业。
Choose the sentence that correctly uses both 增加 and 减少.
exercises.correct: 他增加了锻炼，身体越来越好。
options: 他增加了锻炼，身体越来越好。
他增加锻炼了，身体越来越好。
他了增加锻炼，身体越来越好。
增加锻炼他，身体越来越好。
option_pinyin: Tā zēng jiā le duàn liàn, shēn tǐ yuè lái yuè hǎo.
Tā zēng jiā duàn liàn le, shēn tǐ yuè lái yuè hǎo.
Tā le zēng jiā duàn liàn, shēn tǐ yuè lái yuè hǎo.
Zēng jiā duàn liàn tā, shēn tǐ yuè lái yuè hǎo.

grammar_points.title: 担心 — To worry (common expression patterns)
grammar_points.explanation: 担心 (dān xīn) means 'to worry' or 'to be concerned'. It can be followed by a noun or a clause (introduced by 的 or directly). Common patterns: (1) Subject + 担心 + Noun: 她担心考试。(She worries about the exam.) (2) Subject + 担心 + Clause: 我担心他不来。(I'm worried he won't come.) (3) Subject + 不用/不要担心: Don't worry. (4) 令人担心: Worrying (to cause worry). It is also used in the negative: 不必担心 (no need to worry).

examples.chinese: 他仍然担心天气太冷，所以多穿了几件衣服。
examples.pinyin: Tā réng rán dān xīn tiān qì tài lěng, suǒ yǐ duō chuān le jǐ jiàn yī fu.
examples.english: He is still worried about the cold weather, so he put on a few extra layers.

examples.chinese: 只要你坚持努力，就不必担心发展速度太慢。
examples.pinyin: Zhǐ yào nǐ jiān chí nǔ lì, jiù bú bì dān xīn fā zhǎn sù dù tài màn.
examples.english: As long as you keep working hard, there is no need to worry that your development speed is too slow.

exercises.question: 她 _____ 随着气温降低，出现危险天气。
只要你做好准备，就 _____ 了。
Choose the correct use of 担心.
exercises.correct: 我担心飞机不能顺利降落。
options: 我担心飞机不能顺利降落。
担心我飞机不能顺利降落。
我飞机担心不能顺利降落。
我不能担心飞机顺利降落。
option_pinyin: Wǒ dān xīn fēi jī bù néng shùn lì jiàng luò.
Dān xīn wǒ fēi jī bù néng shùn lì jiàng luò.
Wǒ fēi jī dān xīn bù néng shùn lì jiàng luò.
Wǒ bù néng dān xīn fēi jī shùn lì jiàng luò.

exercises.question: What does 不必担心 mean?
她仍然 _____ 进步太慢，但继续努力。

culture_notes.title: The Secret of Success — 天道酬勤
culture_notes.content: In Chinese culture, success is deeply tied to the values of 坚持 (jiānchí — perseverance) and 努力 (nǔlì — hard work). The proverb 天道酬勤 (tiān dào chóu qín — 'Heaven rewards the diligent') expresses the belief that sustained effort will eventually be rewarded. This value is embedded in Chinese education, where long study hours and exam results are central to a student's identity. At the same time, 运气 (yùnqi — luck) is also acknowledged, and many Chinese people balance belief in hard work with practices that attract good fortune (such as carrying lucky charms, choosing auspicious dates, etc.). The song title 阳光总在风雨后 (Sunshine Always Comes After the Rain) captures this cultural philosophy perfectly: endure hardship with patience, and success will follow.

quiz.question: What does 降低 mean?
quiz.correct: To lower; to reduce; to decrease
options: To lower; to reduce; to decrease

quiz.question: Which word means 'to land; to descend'?
What does 出现 mean?
quiz.correct: To appear; to emerge; to occur
options: To appear; to emerge; to occur

quiz.question: Fill in: _____ 你坚持努力，就一定能成功。
Choose the correct use of 只要...就...
quiz.correct: 只要坚持，就能增加信心。
options: 只要坚持，就能增加信心。
坚持只要，就能增加信心。
只要就坚持，能增加信心。
坚持，就只要增加信心能。

quiz.question: What does the phrase 发生变化 mean?
What does the proverb 天道酬勤 mean?
What does 不必担心 mean?
What is the opposite of 增加?
What does the phrase 增加信心 mean?
Fill in: 气温突然降低，_____ 也随之增加了。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 奥斯汀，你听说了吗？今天气温降低了很多，出现了今年最冷的天气。
lines.pinyin: Ào Sī Tīng, nǐ tīng shuō le ma? Jīn tiān qì wēn jiàng dī le hěn duō, chū xiàn le jīn nián zuì lěng de tiān qì.
lines.english: Austen, did you hear? Today the temperature dropped significantly, with the coldest weather of the year.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是吗？我仍然穿的是夏天的衣服，真的要多穿点了。
lines.pinyin: Shì ma? Wǒ réng rán chuān de shì xià tiān de yī fu, zhēn de yào duō chuān diǎn le.
lines.english: Really? I'm still wearing summer clothes. I really need to put on more layers.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 只要你加件外套，就不必担心着凉了。
lines.pinyin: Zhǐ yào nǐ jiā jiàn wài tào, jiù bú bì dān xīn zháo liáng le.
lines.english: As long as you add a jacket, there's no need to worry about catching a cold.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 谢谢！天气发生变化真的很快，从暖和突然变得这么凉快。
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie! Tiān qì fā shēng biàn huà zhēn de hěn kuài, cóng nuǎn huo tū rán biàn de zhè me liáng kuai.
lines.english: Thanks! The weather changes so quickly — from warm to this cool so suddenly.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 据说明天会更冷，气温下降会继续增加寒意。
lines.pinyin: Jù shuō míng tiān huì gèng lěng, qì wēn xià jiàng huì jì xù zēng jiā hán yì.
lines.english: They say it will be even colder tomorrow, as the falling temperature will continue to add to the chill.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好，我会增加保暖措施，减少外出，以防危险。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ huì zēng jiā bǎo nuǎn cuò shī, jiǎn shǎo wài chū, yǐ fáng wēi xiǎn.
lines.english: Okay, I will increase my warmth measures and reduce going out to prevent danger.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 老师，我仍然担心考试，感觉进步太慢了，怎么办？
lines.pinyin: Lǎo shī, wǒ réng rán dān xīn kǎo shì, gǎn jué jìn bù tài màn le, zěn me bàn?
lines.english: Teacher, I'm still worried about the exam. I feel my progress is too slow. What should I do?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 只要你坚持努力，就一定能增加信心，不必担心。
lines.pinyin: Zhǐ yào nǐ jiān chí nǔ lì, jiù yí dìng néng zēng jiā xìn xīn, bú bì dān xīn.
lines.english: As long as you keep working hard, you will definitely increase your confidence. No need to worry.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 但是我感觉自己的成绩仍然没有发生变化。
lines.pinyin: Dàn shì wǒ gǎn jué zì jǐ de chéng jì réng rán méi yǒu fā shēng biàn huà.
lines.english: But I feel my results still haven't changed.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 记住，阳光总在风雨后。减少担心，增加行动。
lines.pinyin: Jì zhù, yáng guāng zǒng zài fēng yǔ hòu. Jiǎn shǎo dān xīn, zēng jiā xíng dòng.
lines.english: Remember — sunshine always comes after the rain. Reduce worry, increase action.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 谢谢老师。天道酬勤，我会仍然坚持努力的。
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie lǎo shī. Tiān dào chóu qín, wǒ huì réng rán jiān chí nǔ lì de.
lines.english: Thank you, teacher. Heaven rewards the diligent. I will still persist in working hard.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 好！只要你不放弃，好结果就会出现的。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo! Zhǐ yào nǐ bú fàng qì, hǎo jié guǒ jiù huì chū xiàn de.
lines.english: Great! As long as you don't give up, good results will appear.
